Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). - schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. SQLite `source_batch_cache` 快取 6 小時，跨 profile 重用收集結果但仍各自分析；失敗 batch 不可寫 cache\\n- Daily Intel retry 依賴 SQLite `run_items`：analyze/report 重用原 run 資料，deliver 只重送 `report_artifacts`；不可用「完整新 run」取代所有 wildcard 並限制查詢長度/回傳筆數\\n- Daily Intel event cluster 人工 merge/split 只修改 SQLite cluster/member；既有 report artifact 保持不可變，避免 Telegram 已送內容與磁碟檔案被靜默改寫\\n- Daily Intel weekly trend 依 `pipeline_runs.started_at` 計算 UTC 7 日窗口，每個 item/profile 只取最新 analysis，避免 prompt version 重複計數\\n- Daily Intel 兩個內建 profile 的 `report.outputLanguage` 固定為 <name> --keywords <csv>` 建立，使用 `topic-` profile、嚴格 24 小時發布日期、最多 10 篇、繁中報告，並自動建立目前聊天室每日 09:00 排程\\n- Daily Intel `topic-ai` 是手動維護的 AI digest profile 例外：固定來源包含 Google News、AI newsletter、arXiv、官方/產業 RSS，`lookbackHours=72`、`maxHighlights=30`、`report.selectionMode=video`；topic-only RSS 不加通用 `ai` tag，避免污染內建 `ai` profile 的 5 個官方核心來源\\n- `report.selectionMode=video` 會用 story-ready heuristics 重新排序報告候選：強調具體數字/金額、agent/資安/成本衝突、行動建議、討論性與類別多樣性；預設 `score` 模式維持舊行為，一般 `/intel topic add` 仍使用 `score`\\n- Daily Intel 影片產生模式由 profile `report.videoMode` 決定：`podcast` 保留既有 NotebookLM Audio Overview→封面 MP4→YouTube 流程，`notebooklm` 改用 NotebookLM Video Overview 產影片簡報；`report.selectionMode` 只管選題排序，不管產生模式。\\n- `query.publishedAtPolicy=strict` 會在 raw/item 入庫前同時過濾核心與探索來源；缺發布日期、超出 lookback 或未來日期都不進分析與報告，內建 profile 明確使用 `none`\\n- 自訂主題可用 `/intel topic source <profile-id> <add|remove> <source-id>` 綁定既有 Source Catalog 固定來源；探索仍受原有預算、信任折扣與報告占比限制\\n- Daily Intel Exploration Lane 只在 ephemeral ACP session 注入 Agent Browser MCP；候選保存於 `discovered_sources`，探索失敗不得使核心來源 run 失敗，報告需套用 trust discount 與占比上限\\n- Daily Intel 探索頁面需允許最多 2MB HTML；500KB 會讓 AP/Business Insider 等正文在解析前被頁面殼誤殺。啟用 Agent Browser MCP 時，探索 HTTP 回覆**：Kiro agent 的 `session/update` chunk 會即時編輯到同一則 Telegram 訊息（有 429 防護）。\\n- **跨 ACP agent 支援**：同一支 bridge 可接 Kiro / Codex / Claude / Gemini 等任何 ACP adapter，用 `ACP_AGENT_COMMAND` 切換。詳見 定義。`/agent` 換人（CLI subprocess）、`/model` 換腦（Direct API）。\\n- **Session Resume + 多 session 管理**：`ACP_SESSION_RESUME=true` 啟用後，idle/crash/訊號關閉的 session 會在下一則訊息以 `session/load` 恢復完整 context；同時解鎖 `/session` 多 session 管理（列表/切換/新建/改名/關閉，上限 8）。需 adapter 宣告 `loadSession` capability，否則 fallback 開新 session。\\n- **跨機器可攜化 / Environment preamble**：preamble 注入 **Embedding router**：啟動時一次性 embed 所有向量化目標，每 turn 僅需 1 次 embed + brute-force cosine（<2ms），涵蓋 7 個應用（memory recall / skill routing / wiki retrieval / NotebookLM routing / intent classification / sticker 自動選擇 / 重複 fact 偵測）。\\n- **Local LLM（llama.cpp）**：可選整合本機 llama.cpp server（Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE），為 topic 分類、fact dedup、preamble 壓縮等 7 個 NLP 任務提供零成本加速；離線時全部 graceful fallback。Feature flags：`LOCAL_LLM_PREFILTER` / `LOCAL_LLM_RERANK` / `LOCAL_LLM_INTENT_FALLBACK`（預設全開）。\\n- **Hit Log & 效用追蹤**：embedding router / wiki retrieval / skill routing 每次命中都記錄，`/utilityreport` 統計命中率，`/factlint` 標示零命中區。\\n- **Dream 綜合建議報告**：`/dream` 跑完所有步驟後產出彙整報告（升格候選、矛盾待確認、wiki 拆分、過時內容等）。\\n- **Session Reflect（`/dream` 內建步驟）**：掃描今日 session，用本機 LLM 抽取 reusable learnings 分類存放（`fact` / `skill-candidate` / `global-principle`）。\\n- **Self-Improving Agent**：多層自我改進機制——14 類錯誤分類器、連續失敗 ≥2 次自動反思換方法、goal 未達標自動反思重試、使用者否定語自動觸發反思、重複笨拙操作自動寫 script 候選、skill 頻率偵測升格候選。\\n- **Event Log 持久化**：8 種事件類型記錄到 `MEMORY_DIR/event-log.jsonl`，保留 30 天。\\n- **Codegraph 領域索引**：`.codegraph/domains.json` 定義領域邊界，`codegraph_context` 自動注入領域 hint；`/wikigen` 手動觸發專案 wiki 重產。\\n- **AI.md 分層上下文**：工作目錄可放 `AI.md` 記錄項目上下文，agent 讀到/改到某目錄時自動往上找最多 3 層。\\n- **RTK Shell 優化**：偵測 `rtk` binary 有則注入 shell 指令前綴指示，壓縮 git/grep/read 輸出省 token。\\n- **Wiki 知識庫**：結構化知識存在 `MEMORY_DIR/wiki/`，facts 是 source of truth、wiki 是 derived 綜合層。詳見 [docs/memory-system.md](./docs/memory-system.md)。\\n- **NotebookLM routing**：`/refresh-routing` 讓 agent 重新掃所有 notebook、更新語意路由表（需掛 `notebooklm` MCP server）。\\n- **指令系統**：50+ 指令，見「常用指令」表；選單 metadata 集中於 `src/bot-setup.ts` 的 `COMMAND_SPECS`。\\n- **UI**：Telegram Menu Button（☰）+ reply keyboard（`/menu` 常駐）+ `/help` inline keyboard 三者並存。\\n- **傳檔 / 選項按鈕 / 排程 / Wiki 存檔 / Skill 提議**：agent 回覆嵌入 token（`<<SEND_FILE>>` / `<<ASK>>` / `<<SCHEDULE>>` / `<<WIKI_QUERY>>` / `<<SKILL_PROPOSE>>`）觸發對應 bridge 行為，完整規格見 [docs/token-protocols.md](./docs/token-protocols.md)。\\n- **429 防護**：observer transformer 攔 `retry_after`，限流期間暫停 streaming edit、解除後補發；`TG_AUTORETRY_MAX_DELAY_SECONDS` 可調上限。\\n- **自動重啟**：`/restart` 透過 `start.bat` 的 loop 重啟；agent 也可用 `<<RESTART:reason>>` token 自己觸發（詳見 `docs/ab-token-protocol.md` §1.3）。\\n- **Goal 持續性目標**：`/goal <objective>` 設定多 turn 自動執行目標，未回報 `<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>` 就自動 continuation；可設 turn budget、支援 pause/resume/clear，跨 restart 自動恢復。\\n- **Specialist 分身系統**：同機 spawn 多個領域專精 agent（slot-dev / video-prod / researcher / general），三種模式（Proxy / Delegation / Parallel Delegate）。詳見 [docs/multi-agent.md](./docs/multi-agent.md)。\\n- **跨機 Bot-to-Bot 協作（Relay）**：不同機器上的 bridge 透過 Telegram bot-to-bot + Redis fallback 互相委派任務。詳見 [docs/multi-agent.md](./docs/multi-agent.md)。\\n- **Handoff 收工交接**：`/handoff` 產生摘要、寫入長期記憶候選，可選 `keep`（保留 session）或 `backup`。\\n- **Skill 使用追蹤**：記錄每個 skill 被引用的次數與時間，`/skillusage` 查看，`/pin`/`/unpin` 管理。\\n- **啟動健康檢查（Doctor Pattern）**：`bot.start` 完成後跑 6 項健康檢查，結果通知主使用者。\\n- **多 LLM Provider / `/model` 切換**：ACP 與 DirectProvider 兩種後端，`/model [name]` 執行期切換（`kiro`/`claude`/`gpt4o`/`gemini`/`deepseek`/`groq`/`local`）。\\n- **Multi-Model Trio**：短分類/驗證任務用「本機 llama.cpp 優先、Gemini Flash fallback」的輕量 client，支援 routing coordinator、答案交叉驗證、self-fusion 合成。\\n- **Daily Intel 情報系統**：`src/daily-intel/` 每日情報模組——多來源收集、去重、LLM 摘要/分類，推送到 Telegram。指令 `/intel`。\\n- **`/status` Mini App 監控**：獨立 HTTP server + SSE 即時串流，提供進行中任務的 Telegram Mini App 監控面板。\\n- **Tool Observer / Session Archive / Orphan Turn Flusher / Reply Dedup / Optimistic Cancel + Health Monitor / Rich Streaming**：運維層可靠性機制（tool call 落盤、session 結構化歸檔 + LLM 摘要、背景 sub-agent 續寫收攏、結果去重、`/cancel` 快速釋放 + 殭屍進程回收、富文字 streaming）。\\n- **共享知識庫（Shared Knowledge）**：跨機共用 Git repo，`/sharedsync` commit + rebase pull + push（也在 `/dream` 自動跑）。\\n- **Google API MCP**：`mcp-google.ts` + `google-api.ts` 提供 Google Docs / Drive / Maps 等 tool（OAuth，見 `docs/SPEC-google-api-auth.md`）。\\n- **Desktop Pet**：`pet-server.ts` 提供桌面寵物 WebSocket server + mini chat，`/pet [on|off|status]` 控制。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 專案結構\\n\\n```\\nsrc/\\n  index.ts          Telegram bot 主程式、COMMAND_HANDLERS 註冊、streaming pipeline\\n  commands/          各指令 handler（memory / dream / wikigen / specialist.ts       Specialist 分身 spawn / dispatch / proxy / parallel delegate\\n  relay.ts            跨機 Bot-to-Bot relay\\n  observerTransformer.ts  Token 解析 + observer balanced phase\\n Windows 開發用重啟 loop\\n```\\n\\n其餘 `src/` 檔案的逐檔用途說明未列在此（60+ 個模組，會隨開發持續變動，逐檔清單容易腐化）；需要時用 IDE 跳轉或 `codegraph_context` 查詢。\\n\\n執行期會用到的資料夾（已在 `.gitignore` 內，不入版控）：\\n\\n- `uploads/`：Telegram 傳進來的使用者檔案\\n- 驗證環境變數偵測\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 環境變數\\n\\n完整清單請看 [.env.example](./.env.example)。最常用欄位：\\n\\n| 變數 | 說明 | 預設 |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` | 從 @BotFather 取得，**必填** | — |\\n|
